headline: You're stalled at -0.01kg/week; hit -0.62 starting today
summary: You're at -0.01kg/week when -0.62kg/week is required; today, eliminate snacking and do two workouts to reset your trajectory.
details: Eliminate all discretionary snacking today—use Huel for two meals, vegetables and legumes for dinner, nothing extra. Hit the rowing machine for 20 minutes and treadmill for 15 minutes before work ends. Monday after your weekend struggle is your reset point; today you prove you can execute the -0.62kg/week discipline your goal demands.
